docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $153.00 FILED BY OTTENS, DUANE AS TO DEFENDANT ANSANELLI, RUSSELL (MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANSANELLI, RUSSELL (MANAGER)
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE FOR 12/11/97 AT 1:30 PM HAS BEEN DENIED BY THE COMMISSIONER PAULINE M. SLOAN.
DEFT. R. ANSANELLI REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUB- MITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DATE RE- QUESTED DEC. 11, 1997 AT 1:30 PM.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OTTENS, DUANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANSANELLI, RUSSELL (MANAGER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUESTING FOR CONTINUANCE SEND PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGN.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-02-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-05-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
